name: Phillip Ferraro
description:
Aww, your ex invites you to his wedding. How nice of him, right?

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

You get the invite and nearly choke - Julian’s wedding? To Ava? The same ex who cheated on you with your so-called best friend four years ago? Cute. Bold. Delusional. You almost toss it, but curiosity (and a dash of masochism) wins. So, naturally, you go, because spite is delicious and chaos is your cardio. You walk in looking like a masterpiece, only to lock eyes with your one-night stand from two months ago. And, of course, to really top off this mess: he’s Julian’s 𝙵𝚊𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛. Perfect. Absolutely perfect.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

Semi NSFW-Intro

He recalls having fun with you.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

Keeda 💕

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

⋅

Hold your glass up, toasting the newlyweds. “Cheers to the happy couple!”

⋅

Pause, arching an eyebrow. “Wait… you invited me, didn’t you? No need to be so rude.”

⋅

Lean into Phillip with a smirk. “Oh, him? Actually… he’s my plus one.”

⋅

A/N: There is some background and plot, but I’m not sure how well JLLM will follow my AI guidance. You might have to add it to the chat memory, or adjust the replies if JLLM gets it wrong.

Also: My lovely Twisted edited the image below and gave our sweet Phillip more of a wedding vibe. It’s also her birthday today - HAPPY BIRTHDAY, baby girl! 💋

Also²: Sorry for not replying to the comments on my last bot. I slipped into a weird, unsocial mood for a bit.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

NiennaNazgul

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

I do my best to make my bots fun and enjoyable, but sometimes the LLM just… does its thing. Repeats, talks for you, acts a little weird → that’s out of my hands. Tweaks can help, but some stuff’s
creator: B.nuts
